description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named facebook/redex/build_main that runs on pull requests to main and stable branches, on push to main, and on a daily schedule. The workflow uses a 4-core ubuntu runner to build Redex for various environments including Ubuntu 20.04, Debian oldoldstable, stable, unstable, and Windows, with some jobs using clang from llvm.org. It also uploads build artifacts on a scheduled run.
